name: PluginAttribute
summary: The standard attribute which must be applied to all plug-ins.

constructors.name: PluginAttribute(string, string)
constructors.summary: The standard attribute constructor which must be applied to all plug-ins. The combination of Name and DeveloperId should make the plugin unique

params.name: developerId
params.doc: The 4 character ADN developer code or a GUID.

properties.name: DeveloperId
properties.summary: The 4 character ADN developer code or a GUID. The combination of this and Name should make the plugin unique

properties.name: DisplayName
properties.summary: Text to display in the Navisworks GUI

properties.name: ExtendedToolTip
properties.summary: The extended tooltip to display when the Plugin is highlighted in the Navisworks GUI

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: The name of the Plugin. The combination of this and DeveloperId should make the plugin unique

properties.name: Options
properties.summary: Options that modify how a plugin behaves

properties.name: SupportsIsSelfEnabled
properties.summary: Determines if Plugin.IsSelfEnabled will be called.

properties.name: ToolTip
properties.summary: The tooltip to display when the Plugin is highlighted in the Navisworks GUI
